scripts.gen:types: uv run --project apps/api python apps/api/scripts/export_openapi.py > packages/shared-types/openapi.json && pnpm exec openapi-typescript packages/shared-types/openapi.json -o packages/shared-types/src/schema.ts
scripts.lint:api: cd apps/api && uv run ruff check app tests
scripts.lint:fix: pnpm --filter web lint --fix && cd apps/api && uv run ruff check --fix app tests
scripts.format:api: cd apps/api && uv run ruff format app tests scripts
scripts.format:api:check: cd apps/api && uv run ruff format --check app tests scripts
scripts.typecheck:api: cd apps/api && uv run mypy app
